title: Rotten Flesh Smelt To Leather
body:
**🧟 Rotten Flesh Smelt To Leather 🐄**

Ever come back from a long mining trip or a dangerous night and find your inventory packed with stacks of rotten flesh?
Yeah… same.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔥 What does this mod do?**

Simple, balanced, and vanilla-friendly:

➡️ Put rotten flesh in a furnace
➡️ Wait a moment
➡️ Receive leather

No weird machines.
No complicated crafting trees.
No OP mechanics.

Just smart recycling ♻️

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🧩 Mod Compatibility**

Works with normal furnaces and most modded furnaces that support standard smelting.

Lightweight.
No performance impact.
Drop it in and play.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dced67566859ff32d44fbd9104fc7da28d4317e.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD

**Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
